name: opencode-go
description: OpenCode Go with multiple API keys for load distribution. Each account gets 2 groups (OpenAI + Anthropic format). Useful when you have several subscriptions with limited per-key quota.
keyInstructions: Subscribe to multiple OpenCode Go accounts (or share with team members). For each account: copy the API key from https://opencode.ai/auth and provide it when prompted. Keys are stored separately in VS Code's keystore.
